chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 2218 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2018. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS. FOR KATCHA PESHI. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. present. -------- This petition is called for hearing. Neither the petitioner nor his counsel is present. No intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 10.01.2018. It also appears that this petition was filed on 25.8.2016 and since then nobody on behalf of the petition is pursuing this matter diligently, therefore, we have no option but to dismiss this petition for non prosecution. Resultantly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.
